forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 69. Southwest wind around 12 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 97. Heat index values as high as 103. Southwest wind 9 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph.

weather_report:
As night envelops Boston, a serene clarity settles over the city, with gentle whispers of a southwest wind brushing like a comforting hand across the landscape. The temperature holds steady at a soft 69 degrees, creating a pleasant ambiance for a late evening stroll through the quiet streets. Stars might be shy this evening, but the twinkling lights of the city weave a tapestry of warmth against the night.

Tomorrow, the sun will rise and dance freely across the sky, bringing with it the promise of heat—up to a sweltering 97 degrees. The air will carry whispers of humidity, with heat indices pushing the feel of the day even higher. As the sun climbs, one can expect a lively breeze that will tease and play with hair and clothes, but the warmth will demand your attention. Dress lightly, in breathable fabrics that allow the skin to breathe, perhaps with a wide-brimmed hat to ward off the sun’s bright embrace. Given the vibrant day ahead, a leisurely stroll along the Charles River or a quiet visit to a shady cafe could provide both respite and relaxation. Whether enjoying a good book outdoors or indulging in a favorite iced drink, the day invites simple pleasures abundant in existence.
